bakery style oreo stuffed cookies 🍪🥛    recipe: ingredients: ¾ cup salted butter, softened (170 g) ¾ cup packed brown sugar (150 g) ¼ cup granulated sugar (50 g) 1 large egg  1 tsp vanilla (5 g) 2 cups all-purpose flour (240 g) 1 tbsp cornstarch (8 g) ½ tsp baking soda (3 g) ¼ tsp salt (1.5 g) oreos, some whole some  roughly chopped  white chocolate (measure with your heart)  & choceur cookie and cream chocolate’s   instructions: cream the butter and sugars together  until smooth and slightly fluffy. mix in the egg and vanilla until fully combined. in a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, cornstarch, baking soda, and salt. fold the dry ingredients into the wet just until combined.  chop some of the oreos into small chunks ( leave some for topping ) and fold them in along with the white chocolate. scoop the dough into 8 portions, flatten and add an oreo inside and chocolate then shape into tall mounds. ( i flatten the top but keep them tall ) bake at 375°F for 11–14 minutes, until the edges are set and the centers are still soft. ( baking time may vary ) let cool to set the cookies!  i added moser roths white chocolate to the bottom & inside !    #oreo #cookies #chocolatechipcookies #Recipe #baking

Pt 11 | Honest review of cushion foundations! JungSaemMool Essential Skin Nuder Cushion  Thoughts:  As someone with normal/combo skin, this amount of dewy was too much for me. Unless I used a lot of powder it would make me look more greasy than glass skin! I loved everything else though— it was lightweight, super natural, and application was foolproof. But for a cushion that costs $32 it just didn’t justify the cost for me 🥲  #cushionfoundation #jungsaemmool #review #kbeauty #koreanmakeup

RASPBERRY TIRAMISU 💕✨ Welcome to Episode 17 of my tiramisu series! This Raspberry Tiramisu aka Raspberrymisu is long overdue, and my most requested flavor! It has definitely earned a spot up there. From the vibrant pink and sweet and sour flavors from the berries it’s hard not to love this dessert. It has a layer of raspberry mascarpone cream, raspberry dipped ladyfingers and a raspberry sauce topping. It’s a raspberry dream 😍 Add it to your summer dessert list ASAP. Ingredients  - 3/4 cup of homemade raspberry juice  - 1 ½ cups of heavy cream or double cream - 16 oz or 450g of mascarpone cheese - ¾ cup of granulated sugar - 1 teaspoons of vanilla extract - 260 g of Ladyfingers or enough to fill the dish Topping - Homemade raspberry sauce  - Fresh raspberries for topping  - Mint leaves for garnish  #raspberrytiramisu #raspberrydessert #uniquedesserts #tiramisunoegg  #adesserttomakeanydayspecial
We're back at the most beautiful dessert shop in LA! 😍😭 (Location: Aurora - Shimmering Delicacies) @Aurora LA

Bulgarian split squats will humble you every single time 😭 but if you want stronger glutes, toned legs, better balance, and that sculpted lower body look… you can’t skip them. One leg at a time means no cheating, no relying on your stronger side, just pure growth and stability. They burn like crazy but the results speak for themselves 🍑 Save this workout and add it to your next leg day if you’re serious about building those glutes and leveling up your physique. #bulgariansplitsquats #glutegrowth #legdayworkout #fitnessgirl #GymTok

Boomer’s weight loss journey started the moment he entered our house. We put him on Blue Buffalo Healthy Weight dry and canned food. He was only being fed two times a day. He has already started losing weight purely because he is being fed an appropriate amount of food. We aren’t walking him yet but we are encouraging him to walk around the house and the yard. #petweightloss #overweightdog #seniordog #beagle #bluebuffalo

Strawberry Nutella Brownies 🍫💌🍓 So fudgy & perfect for valentines!  (Recipe makes an 8x8 pan) Ingredients: 10 tbsp (140g) unsalted butter, melted 1 cup (200g) granulated sugar ¼ cup (50g) brown sugar, packed  2 eggs, room temp 1 tsp vanilla extract ½ cup + 2 tbsp (56g) unsweetened cocoa powder ½ tsp salt 1 tbsp (13g) vegetable oil ½ cup (63g) all purpose flour, spooned & leveled or weighed (don’t pack it in) ¾ cup chocolate chips/ chunks 190g (~⅔ cup) Nutella  Topping: strawberry slices, patted dry (as many as you want/enough to cover the top) Nutella (to spread over the top and drizzle)  *if the nutella is too thick to drizzle you can melt it slightly in the microwave Instructions: Line an 8x8 pan with parchment paper. Spread the nutella onto the parchment into a thin, even square the size of the pan. Freeze for at least 20-30 minutes. Preheat oven to 325°F (163°C) and line/grease an 8x8-inch pan with parchment. In a large bowl, whisk melted butter, granulated sugar, and brown sugar until smooth. Add eggs and vanilla, then whisk vigorously for 1-2 minutes to help create a crackly top. Stir in cocoa powder and salt until fully combined. Mix in oil, then gently fold in the flour until just combined (don’t over mix). Fold in chocolate chips/chopped chocolate. Spread half the batter into the greased pan. Place the frozen nutella sheet on top of it. Then, spread the remaining batter over it to cover the nutella layer completely. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick near the center comes out with no wet batter. It should just come out with a little nutella & slightly moist crumbs. Let the brownies cool completely. Spread a thin layer of nutella over the cooled brownies, add the strawberry slices (patted dry) all over the top, and drizzle with more nutella.  Best enjoyed fresh!   #bakingrecipe #fudgybrownies #chocolatestrawberries #nutella #Recipe

Recipe below!👇🏼Why spend at M&S when you can make it at home and even better 🍓☀️ ⭐️ Ingredients: - 6-8 fresh strawberries (preferably similar size) - 4 slices of soft white bread (crustless milk bread if possible) - 200ml double cream - 2 tbsp sugar - 1/2 tsp vanilla extract (optional) ⭐️ Method： 1. Wash strawberries. 2. Beat heavy cream with sugar (and vanilla if using) until stiff peaks form. 3. Spread whipped cream on bread, place strawberries, cover with more cream, and top with another bread slice. 4. Wrap tightly in plastic wrap and chill for 30 minutes. 5. Slice cleanly and enjoy! #sando #strawberrysando #strawberries #strawberriesandcream #aesthetic #trending #marksandspencer #viral #fyp #baking #baketok #dessert #explore #Recipe #EasyRecipe

So fluffy & delicious!🤎 Recipe below👇🏼  🍩 Ingredients Dough: * 300g strong white bread flour * 30g caster sugar * 1/2 tsp salt * 7g fast-action yeast * 2 eggs * 75ml warm milk * 50g melted butter Chocolate Pastry Cream: * 540g whole milk * 2 tsp vanilla extract * 18g cocoa powder * 2 eggs * 2 egg yolks * 100g brown sugar * 25g cornstarch * ¼ tsp sea salt * 170g milk chocolate, chopped * 30g butter 🧾Instructions 1. Make the Dough Mix flour, sugar, salt, and yeast in a bowl. Add eggs, warm milk, and melted butter. Knead until elastic by hand or in mixer. Cover and let rise for 1 hour. 2. Shape & Proof Punch down the dough and divide into 65g portions. Roll each piece into a smooth ball and place onto individual squares of baking paper. Arrange on a tray, cover loosely, and let rise for another hour.  3. Make Chocolate Cream Heat milk and vanilla until steaming. In a bowl, whisk cocoa, eggs, yolks, sugar, cornstarch, and salt. Slowly add the hot milk while whisking constantly, then return to pan and cook until thick & bubbling. Off heat, stir in chocolate and butter. Chill with plastic wrap touching the surface. 4. Fry the Donuts Fry donuts in hot oil. Fry until golden. Drain and roll in sugar. 5. Fill Transfer the chilled chocolate pastry cream to a piping bag fitted with a round nozzle. Poke a small hole in the side of each donut and pipe in the filling generously.  Enjoy! 🤎 #baking #donuts #donutlover #chocolatedonut #explore #baketok #dessert #sweettreat #bomboloni #aesthetic #trending #viral #Recipe #bakingtherapy #asmr #lanadelrey #pinterest #girltherapy #imjustgirl

This routine is for anyone who is not dealing with extreme damage but wants over all glossier & softer hair this is the the exact routine I built for getting glass hair on fine hair but will work for the wavy curly hair girls too!!  the science: the flatten your cuticle lies, the more light it reflects that's what gives the illusion of glass. glossy hair isn't a product, it's the consistency of routine over time that’s keeping that cuticle smooth from prewash to final styling  it took me a while to figure out the system, but once I did, the results compounded and now I wanna share my favourite tips with you because this is the routine that actually for every  wash day. the 5 things I never skip: 1. always create a barrier before shampoo: hair oil or conditioner first. less friction = less cuticle damage = more shine 2. weekly hair mask. deep hydration is what keeps that cuticle flat and the shine consistent. 3. a glossing treatment every 3-4 weeks  this is the step that takes glossy to glass  4. leave-in conditioner every single wash. beats frizz and keeps the cuticle flat between washes. 5. the hair sandwich method oil before heat styling AND after. then always finish with a cool shot to lock the cuticle in place ✨ Hope these haircare tips help you guys!! #hair #haircare #glasshair #hairgloss

the hair care routine that keeps my hair healthy ✨    all products linked on my shopmy which is linked in my bio    here’s the exact timeframe i follow each week: • i oil my hair 1–3x a week • i wash my hair based on oiliness, usually about every 2 days. i don’t follow a strict wash schedule • i use either a milk treatment, protein treatment, hair mask, or hair gloss about once a week #haircare #hairtok #healthyhair #hairroutine #hairtreatment

As promised, this is my current scalp care routine! I previously didn’t think additional scalp care would do much for me, but the research behind the Pantene Abundant & Strong system (and all the research I’ve found on other scalp ingredients / products since) really changed my mind. Now I think about my scalp care routine as a proactive routine to keep my scalp + new hair growth in the healthiest state possible. This isn’t a routine that I think everyone *needs* to do, but for those who are also interested in promoting scalp health & improving hair retention, hopefully this gives you some steps to choose from that might help! Also- the results I’ve seen would only be from the scalp serums + shampoos alone because I haven’t been using the scalp device or red light helmet long enough to see any visible change yet. OGX Pro Growth + Peptide Shampoo 4. Dr Groot Scalp Revitalizing Hair Thickening Shampoo 5. DS Labs Scalp Activator - this was gifted with no obligation to review 6. Ooey-Gooey Scoopable Nutella Cookie Pie🤤 Yields: 15-16 Chunky Cookies INGREDIENTS:  230g Cold Chopped Unsalted Butter  160g Caster Sugar  160g Light Brown Sugar  450g Chocolate Chunks or chips  475g Plain Flour  1 tsp Salt 3 tsp Baking Powder  3/4 tsp Baking Soda  2 Eggs  1 Egg Yolk  1 tsp Vanilla  INSTRUCTIONS: •Cut cling wrap into small squares. Scoop ½ teaspoon Nutella onto individual cling-wrap squares. Fold to seal and freeze until solid. (Repeat for however many Nutella stuffed cookies you plan to make.) •In a large mixing bowl, add the cold cubed butter and whisk until slightly creamy. Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 90g balls. Press a frozen Nutella piece into the centre of each dough ball, seal well, and roll into a smooth ball. •Place the stuffed cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). •Take any shape baking dish circle, square, rectangle anything and line it with parchment paper. Arrange frozen cookie dough balls in it leaving some space between them. •Bake for 10-15 minutes (timing depends on the type of pan) or until the tops are lightly golden while the centres remain soft and gooey. •Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. •Serve warm with ice cream and chocolate sauce enjoy!✨ NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. Whenever a cookie craving hits, bake straight from frozen🫶🏻 #cookie #nutella #cookiepie #fyp #viral

Classic chocolate chip cookies 🤤 Yields: 15-16 Cookies INGREDIENTS:  230g Cold Chopped Unsalted Butter  160g Caster Sugar  160g Light Brown Sugar  450g Chocolate Chunks or chips  475g Plain Flour  1 tsp Salt 3 tsp Baking Powder  3/4 tsp Baking Soda  2 Eggs  1 Egg Yolk  1 tsp Vanilla  INSTRUCTIONS: •In a large mixing bowl, add the cold cubed butter and whisk until slightly creamy. Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 75-80g balls. •Place the cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 165-170C. Bake for 10-15 minutes or until the tops are lightly golden while the centres remain soft. •Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. •Serve warm with ice cream. NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. Whenever a cookie craving hits, bake straight from frozen🫶🏻 #cookie #chocolate #fyp #explorepage✨ #viralvideos
